name: Tandoori Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the chicken drumsticks, wash thoroughly and dry on absorbent paper.
2. Slash them with a sharp pointed knife.
3. Rub in the lemon juice and sprinkle with salt.
4. Blend the ginger and garlic in a blender with 2 tablespoons water, then mix with the coriander, cumin, chilli powder, paprika, red food coloring, garam masala and pepper.
5. Stir into yogurt.
6. Smother the drumsticks in the spiced yogurt and leave covered in the fridge to marinate overnight.
7. Lay the drumsticks on a rack across a roasting tin and cook in the oven at 200 degrees Celsius for approximately 45 minutes, until tender.
8. Sprinkle with extra salt to taste and garnish with lemon and onion slices.
